scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within bioinformatics data processing scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: Quality scoring and variant detection logic is methodologically appropriate for Sanger QA; mixed-peak severity placeholder explicitly disclosed with quantitative guidance.

code_usability.detail: Script compiles; detect_mixed_signals is a placeholder returning 0 — documented limitation with explicit disclosure in SKILL.md. Path traversal check documented in Error Handling.

functional_suitability.note: Mixed-peak severity requirement explicit with placeholder disclosure mandate; path traversal check documented in Error Handling section; --demo flag in Quick Check.

reliability.note: Input Validation at Step 1 enforces early scope exit; path traversal check documented; scope check fires before any processing.

Path traversal check documented in Error Handling section for --ab1 file path
NGS alternative tool suggestion (FastQC, variant calling pipeline) in out-of-scope refusal message

recommendations.title: Mixed-peak detection is a placeholder returning 0 — fourth consecutive round
recommendations.problem: detect_mixed_signals always returns 0, making heterozygous SNP detection non-functional — a core advertised feature. This gap persists into v4.
recommendations.root_cause: Script was scaffolded without implementing BioPython ab1 parsing or peak analysis logic; not addressed across four rounds.
recommendations.fix: Implement ab1 parsing using BioPython (Bio.SeqIO.read with 'abi' format). Extract channel traces and detect positions where secondary peak height exceeds 25% of primary peak.

recommendations.title: Path traversal check documented but not implemented in script
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents path traversal check for --ab1 in Error Handling, but the script does not enforce it at runtime.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation fix applied to SKILL.md but not translated into script logic.
recommendations.fix: Add path validation in main.py: if '../' in args.ab1 or os.path.isabs(args.ab1): print('Path traversal detected', file=sys.stderr); sys.exit(1).

recommendations.title: --variant-pos parameter documented in SKILL.md but absent from script argparse
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md Parameters table documents --variant-pos for expected mutation site but the script argparse does not include it.
recommendations.root_cause: Script was scaffolded without implementing the variant position parameter.
recommendations.fix: Add --variant-pos argument to argparse and use it to focus mixed-peak detection and variant confirmation around the specified position.
